name: digital-marketing-pro
description: End-to-end digital marketing engagement methodology. 150 portable Agent Skills covering brand setup, content production, SEO/AEO/GEO audits (6 platforms including Google AI Mode), ad campaigns, email, social, compliance (GDPR/CCPA/EU AI Act Article 50), and agency operations. 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents.

interface.shortDescription: 150-skill engagement methodology for marketing teams — SEO, AEO, ads, content, email, social, compliance.
interface.longDescription: Digital Marketing Pro brings a canonical 12-Part Strategy Flow to OpenAI Codex via 150 portable Agent Skills. Run a full brand engagement (Stone-vs-Opinion intake -> external research -> Four Core Documents -> competitive/customer/market analysis -> Client Validation -> v2 re-runs -> Growth Plan + Yearly Planner -> channel fan-out -> execution artefacts -> AI creative instructions -> continuous improvement) or pick individual workflows: SEO audit, AEO audit (now 6 platforms including Google AI Mode), ad-creative production with C2PA provenance for EU AI Act Article 50, content briefs with Gemini Omni / Nano Banana Pro / Veo 3.1 guidance, influencer briefs with deepfake-disclosure clauses, agency-portfolio dashboards. Skills are platform-portable (same SKILL.md frontmatter open standard used by Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot CLI). Optional Python scripts (campaign tracking, GEO monitoring, technical SEO auditing, C2PA signing) run when Python 3.8+ is available; fall back gracefully when not. 14 HTTP MCP connectors (Slack, HubSpot, Notion, Stripe, Gmail, Google Calendar, Asana, Webflow, Ahrefs, SimilarWeb, Klaviyo, Amplitude, Figma, Canva) connect only when env vars are configured.
interface.defaultPrompt: Set up a new brand for digital marketing engagement.
